What it does: Change to a workshop map by id

Example: css_cvar game_type 1; css_cvar game_mode 2; css_map de_dust2
What it does: Switch mode = set game_type + game_mode then reload a map. Combos: Casual 0/0, Competitive 0/1, Wingman 0/2, ArmsRace 1/0, Demolition 1/1, Deathmatch 1/2
